instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.subtitle: Learn how the evaluation process works for both roles
instructions.evaluatorDescription: As an evaluator, you manage the evaluation process, configure profiles, and analyze results.
instructions.evaluatedDescription: As a candidate, you complete evaluations to showcase your competencies and receive personalized feedback.

whatIsEvaluatedItems.professional: Professional competencies — Technical knowledge, industry expertise, and role-specific skills
whatIsEvaluatedItems.softSkills: Soft skills — Communication, teamwork, leadership, and interpersonal abilities
whatIsEvaluatedItems.readiness: Readiness for change — Adaptability, innovation mindset, and openness to new challenges
whatIsEvaluatedItems.cognitive: Cognitive abilities — Logical reasoning, problem-solving, and analytical thinking (timed IQ-style test)
whatIsEvaluatedItems.personality: Personality profile — Big Five (OCEAN) traits: openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, neuroticism
whatIsEvaluatedItems.disc: Behavioral style — DISC assessment: Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, Conscientiousness
whatIsEvaluatedItems.aptitude: Aptitude — Numerical, verbal, and analytical reasoning abilities
whatIsEvaluatedItems.technical: Technical knowledge — Case study-based evaluation specific to the role

evaluatorSteps.title: Steps for the Evaluator
evaluatorSteps.step1: Log in to the admin panel at Administration > Login with your credentials
evaluatorSteps.step2: Select or create the evaluation profile that matches the role you are assessing
evaluatorSteps.step3: Generate a shareable evaluation link and send it to the candidate
evaluatorSteps.step4: Wait for the candidate to complete the evaluation — you will see results in the admin panel
evaluatorSteps.step5: Review the results: competency indices, assigned profiles, strengths, and growth areas
evaluatorSteps.step6: Optionally, use Job-Fit analysis to compare the candidate against job requirements
evaluatorSteps.step7: Export results as PDF or use the comparison tool to evaluate multiple candidates side by side

evaluatedSteps.title: Steps for the Candidate
evaluatedSteps.step1: Open the evaluation link provided by your evaluator, or select a profile from the home page
evaluatedSteps.step2: Fill in your basic information (name and email)
evaluatedSteps.step3: Answer all questions honestly — there are no right or wrong answers for competency questions
evaluatedSteps.step4: For timed tests (cognitive, aptitude), manage your time carefully — the timer is visible on screen
evaluatedSteps.step5: For personality and DISC tests, choose the answer that best describes your natural behavior
evaluatedSteps.step6: Submit your evaluation — results are generated automatically
evaluatedSteps.step7: Review your results: you will see your competency scores, strengths, and personalized recommendations

evaluatorTips.tip1: You can configure which tests to include when creating an evaluation link
evaluatorTips.tip2: Use the history section to track all past evaluations and filter by date or candidate
evaluatorTips.tip3: The AI analysis (when enabled) provides deeper insights and training recommendations

evaluatedTips.tip1: Find a quiet environment with a stable internet connection before starting
evaluatedTips.tip2: Answer based on your actual behavior, not what you think is expected
evaluatedTips.tip3: You can download your results as a PDF for your records

instructions.newSubtitle: Discover all the tools and features of the skaills platform

evaluationsSection.title: Competency Evaluations
evaluationsSection.description: Evaluate professional skills, soft skills, and readiness for change across 43 profiles in 15 industry sectors.

features.f1: 43 evaluation profiles across 15 sectors and 5 levels (executive to operative)
features.f3: Automated scoring with AI-powered analysis and recommendations
features.f4: Shareable evaluation links for remote candidate assessment
features.f5: PDF export and detailed results with strength/growth analysis

testsSection.title: Specialized Tests
testsSection.description: Go beyond competencies with cognitive, personality, behavioral, aptitude, and technical assessments.

cognitive.title: Cognitive Test
cognitive.desc: 20 timed IQ-style questions measuring logical reasoning, pattern recognition, and problem-solving. Results include IQ estimate and percentile ranking.

personality.title: Personality Profile
personality.desc: 50-question Big Five (OCEAN) assessment measuring Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism.

disc.title: DISC Assessment
disc.desc: 28 forced-choice pairs measuring behavioral style: Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, and Conscientiousness.

aptitude.title: Aptitude Test
aptitude.desc: 20 questions evaluating numerical reasoning, verbal comprehension, and analytical thinking abilities.

technical.title: Technical Knowledge
technical.desc: Case study-based evaluation with role-specific scenarios testing practical knowledge and decision-making.

profilesSection.title: Professional Profiles
profilesSection.description: Browse and select from 43 evaluation profiles organized by industry sector and career level.
profilesSection.sectors: 15 industry sectors including technology, banking, healthcare, insurance, education, hospitality, and more
profilesSection.levels: 5 career levels: Executive, Managerial, Professional/Specialist, Administrative, Operative
profilesSection.customizable: Each profile includes tailored competency categories and evaluation questions

candidatesSection.title: Candidate Management
candidatesSection.description: Organization managers can maintain a complete candidate database with pipeline tracking, file management, and evaluation integration.

features.f1: Full candidate profiles with contact info, files (CV, photo, certificates), and custom checklists
features.f2: 6-stage hiring pipeline: Interest Received → Contacted → Interviewed → Evaluated → Reference Check → Final Review
features.f3: Manager scoring (0-100), recommendations (hire, discard, contact, keep info), and private comments
features.f4: Link candidates to job positions and view their evaluation/test results
features.f5: Send invitation links — candidates register and become linked automatically
features.f6: Candidate self-service portal for updating personal info and uploading documents

reviewsSection.title: 360° and 180° Reviews
reviewsSection.description: Run multi-rater performance review campaigns with customizable evaluation criteria.

features.f1: Create review campaigns with configurable type (360° or 180°), date range, and participant selection
features.f2: Assign raters by role: self, supervisor, peer, or subordinate
features.f3: Track completion status and view scores across 9 dimensions (leadership, communication, teamwork, etc.)
features.f4: Compare ratings across rater roles for comprehensive performance insights

climateSection.title: Workplace Climate Surveys
climateSection.description: Measure organizational health with anonymous surveys across key workplace dimensions.

features.f1: Create surveys with scale and open-text questions across 6 categories
features.f2: Categories: work environment, leadership, communication, growth, compensation, work-life balance
features.f3: Anonymous response collection with department targeting
features.f4: Results dashboard with category scores, department breakdowns, highlights, and concerns

employeesSection.title: Employee Management
employeesSection.description: Manage your workforce with lifecycle tracking and probation period monitoring.

features.f1: Employee database with position, department, supervisor, and hire date
features.f2: Probation period evaluations with score tracking and alerts
features.f3: Link employees to evaluation profiles for ongoing assessment

jobFitSection.title: Job Fit Analysis
jobFitSection.description: Match candidates to job requirements with weighted multi-dimensional scoring.

features.f1: Define job profiles with minimum scores, preferred DISC styles, and custom weights
features.f2: 6-dimension weighted scoring: competency, cognitive, personality, aptitude, DISC, technical
features.f3: Gap analysis with priority classification (critical, important, minor)
features.f4: Side-by-side candidate comparison with radar charts

organizationsSection.title: Organizations
organizationsSection.description: Multi-tenant organization management with role-based access control.

features.f1: Create and manage organizations with customizable settings
features.f2: Invite members by email with role assignment (owner, admin, member, viewer)
features.f3: Configure AI analysis providers and API keys per organization

resultsSection.title: Results & Reports
resultsSection.description: Comprehensive reporting with visual charts, PDF exports, and data downloads.

features.f1: Interactive score gauges with level labels and category drill-down
features.f2: Comparative benchmarks showing candidate performance vs. profile average
features.f3: Radar charts for multi-dimensional competency visualization
features.f4: PDF export with cover page, executive summary, and detailed breakdown
features.f5: CSV and Excel export for evaluation history with custom filters
features.f6: AI-powered analysis with training recommendations (Claude, OpenAI, or Gemini)
